title: CodeGrind: Enhanced AI Assistant for Guided DSA Practice
summary: Introduces improved AI assistant capabilities to CodeGrind, offering guided problem-solving help, model switching, and a streamlined chat experience within the existing DSA practice platform.
core_message: CodeGrind now ships an upgraded AI assistant (Azure OpenAI) with multiple model options, improved persistence, and a more capable guidance flow to help users solve LeetCode-style problems faster while keeping the learning experience engaging.
cta: Try the updated AI assistant in your next practice session and share feedback to help refine the guidance flow.
visual_brief: Short demonstration video: UI showing AI chat panel, model switcher, real-time code execution, and solving a sample problem with step-by-step hints. Include subtle CodeGrind branding and cyberpunk UI cues.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind introduces an upgraded AI assistant for guided DSA practice. See the AI chat panel, model switcher, and real-time code execution in action. Try the updated assistant in your next session and share feedback to refine the guidance flow. https://codegrind.online

linkedin.text: CodeGrind announces an upgraded AI assistant for guided DSA practice, built on Azure OpenAI with multiple model options, enhanced persistence, and a streamlined chat experience. The new flow helps users solve LeetCode-style problems faster while keeping learning engaging. Try the updated assistant in your next practice session and share feedback to help refine the guidance flow. Learn more: https://codegrind.online
